corrections.location: XXV 1, first line after chapter break
corrections.note: Printed text has ωραιώθην, not ὡραιόσθην.

corrections.current: καὶ γυνὴ καὶ ἀνὴρ ἑαυτοῖς συμπεριφερόμενοι.
corrections.correct: καὶ γυνὴ καὶ ἀνὴρ ἑαυτοῖς συνπεριφερόμενοι.
corrections.note: Body reads συνπεριφερόμενοι with nu, not συμπεριφερόμενοι.
A superscript στιγμα/verse marker precedes ἐν in print; transcript omits it. If verse markers are being transcribed, this line should begin with 3᾽/ϛ᾽ as printed.
Lemma in apparatus has omega, matching body.

corrections.note: The ℵ reading appears to be συναγιοχας as well; the note concerns superscript xas, not an inserted epsilon after γ.

notes: Running head and main body largely match. Right-margin line numbers/parenthetical numbers are correctly not transcribed. One body issue is orthographic in the printed text itself (συνπεριφερόμενοι).
